overview: Personal portfolio website for Ashwin Singh Chouhan, a pharmacologist and researcher. Features vibrant 3D-animated design with sections for Researches, Articles, Publications, Notes, About, and Contact. Includes a full admin panel for content management with file upload and external URL support.
features: Animated 3D hero section with mouse-tracked parallax
Content sections: Researches, Articles, Publications, Notes
Admin login with secure password protection
Admin CRUD controls on every content card (edit/delete)
File-first upload flow with platform object storage
External URL linking option for journal links and Google Drive
3D hover cards with vibrant color gradients
About page with author bio and credentials
